---
title: "Detection Explorer - Single Tag"
page-layout: full
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)

boundary102 <- readRDS(
  "data/boundary102.rds"
)

detections <- readRDS(
  "data/detections.rds"
)
selected_tag <- "013EFFF1"

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Prepare tabular detection data
# ------------------------------------------------------------

detections_df <-
  if(inherits(detections, "sf")) {
    st_drop_geometry(detections)
  } else {
    detections
  }

# Add optional metadata fields if absent, so popups do not fail

if(!"Sex" %in% names(detections_df)) {
  detections_df$Sex <- NA_character_
}

if(!"TagSiteName" %in% names(detections_df)) {
  detections_df$TagSiteName <- NA_character_
}

if(!"tracking_period" %in% names(detections_df)) {
  detections_df$tracking_period <- NA_character_
}

if(!"episode_type" %in% names(detections_df)) {
  detections_df$episode_type <- NA_character_
}

if(!"behavior_type" %in% names(detections_df)) {
  detections_df$behavior_type <- NA_character_
}

# Point styling category

detections_df$episode_type_map <-
  ifelse(
    is.na(detections_df$episode_type),
    "unclassified",
    detections_df$episode_type
  )

detections_df$behavior_type_map <-
  ifelse(
    is.na(detections_df$behavior_type),
    "unclassified",
    detections_df$behavior_type
  )
# Site label for popups

detections_df$SiteName_popup <-
  ifelse(
    is.na(detections_df$SiteName),
    "outside / unassigned",
    detections_df$SiteName
  )

# Keep rows with usable step coordinates

detections_df <-
  detections_df[
    is.finite(detections_df$x1_) &
      is.finite(detections_df$y1_) &
      is.finite(detections_df$x2_) &
      is.finite(detections_df$y2_),
  ]

detections_df$row_id <-
  seq_len(
    nrow(detections_df)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Keep only boundaries associated with detection sites
# ------------------------------------------------------------

boundary102 <-
  boundary102[
    boundary102$SiteName %in%
      unique(
        na.omit(
          detections_df$SiteName
        )
      ),
  ]

boundary102$SiteStatus_map <-
  ifelse(
    !is.na(boundary102$SiteStatus) &
      boundary102$SiteStatus == "Active",
    "Active",
    "Other"
  )

site_status_pal <-
  colorFactor(
    palette = c(
      "#984EA3",
      "#BDBDBD"
    ),
    domain = c(
      "Active",
      "Other"
    )
  )

behavior_pal <-
  colorFactor(
    palette = c(
      "#E69F00",
      "#0072B2",
      "#009E73"
    ),
    domain = c(
      "migration",
      "premigration",
      "winter"
    )
  )

episode_type_pal <-
  colorFactor(
    palette = c(
      foray = "#E41A1C",
      visit = "#984EA3",
      unclassified = "#7F7F7F"
    ),
    domain = c(
      "foray",
      "visit",
      "unclassified"
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Boundary geometry
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Apply the same small south adjustment used for detections.

boundary102 <-
  st_transform(
    boundary102,
    32610
  )

geom_boundary <-
  st_geometry(boundary102) + c(0, -25)

st_geometry(boundary102) <-
  st_set_crs(
    geom_boundary,
    32610
  )

boundary102 <-
  st_transform(
    boundary102,
    4326
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Reduce point density for faster web-map rendering
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Keeps up to 500 detections per tag_id x behavior_type group.

set.seed(1)

max_points_per_group <- 500

sampling_group <-
  interaction(
    detections_df$tag_id,
    ifelse(
      is.na(detections_df$behavior_type),
      "missing_behavior",
      detections_df$behavior_type
    ),
    drop = TRUE
  )

sample_ids <-
  unlist(
    tapply(
      seq_len(nrow(detections_df)),
      sampling_group,
      function(ii) {
        sample(
          ii,
          min(
            length(ii),
            max_points_per_group
          )
        )
      }
    )
  )

detections_map_df <-
  detections_df[
    sample_ids,
  ]

detections_map_df <-
  detections_map_df |>
  filter(
    tag_id == selected_tag
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Correct detection start geometry
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Rebuild starts from x1_ / y1_ as EPSG:32612,
# transform to EPSG:32610,
# apply c(0, -25),
# then transform to WGS84 for Leaflet.

detection_starts_32610 <-
  st_as_sf(
    detections_map_df,
    coords = c(
      "x1_",
      "y1_"
    ),
    crs = 32612,
    remove = FALSE
  ) |>
  st_transform(
    32610
  )

geom_start <-
  st_geometry(detection_starts_32610) + c(0, -25)

st_geometry(detection_starts_32610) <-
  st_set_crs(
    geom_start,
    32610
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Correct detection end geometry
# ------------------------------------------------------------

detection_ends_32610 <-
  st_as_sf(
    detections_map_df,
    coords = c(
      "x2_",
      "y2_"
    ),
    crs = 32612,
    remove = FALSE
  ) |>
  st_transform(
    32610
  )

geom_end <-
  st_geometry(detection_ends_32610) + c(0, -25)

st_geometry(detection_ends_32610) <-
  st_set_crs(
    geom_end,
    32610
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Extract corrected coordinates
# ------------------------------------------------------------

start_coords <-
  st_coordinates(
    detection_starts_32610
  )

end_coords <-
  st_coordinates(
    detection_ends_32610
  )

detections_map_df$start_X <-
  start_coords[
    ,
    "X"
  ]

detections_map_df$start_Y <-
  start_coords[
    ,
    "Y"
  ]

detections_map_df$end_X <-
  end_coords[
    ,
    "X"
  ]

detections_map_df$end_Y <-
  end_coords[
    ,
    "Y"
  ]

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build solid detection step lines
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# These connect x1_/y1_ to x2_/y2_ for each sampled detection row.

detection_line_geom <-
  st_sfc(
    lapply(
      seq_len(nrow(detections_map_df)),
      function(i) {
        st_linestring(
          matrix(
            c(
              detections_map_df$start_X[i],
              detections_map_df$start_Y[i],
              detections_map_df$end_X[i],
              detections_map_df$end_Y[i]
            ),
            ncol = 2,
            byrow = TRUE
          )
        )
      }
    ),
    crs = 32610
  )

detection_lines <-
  st_sf(
    detections_map_df,
    geometry = detection_line_geom
  ) |>
  st_transform(
    4326
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Build dashed transition lines between episodes/new dates
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# These connect the previous detection end point to the next
# detection start point for the same tag when a new episode starts
# or the observation date changes.

transition_df <-
  detections_map_df |>
  arrange(
    tag_id,
    t1_
  ) |>
  group_by(
    tag_id
  ) |>
  mutate(
    prev_end_X = lag(end_X),
    prev_end_Y = lag(end_Y),
    prev_t2 = lag(t2_),
    prev_state = lag(state),
    prev_episode_id = lag(episode_id),
    prev_obs_date = lag(obs_date),
    transition_flag =
      new_episode |
      obs_date != lag(obs_date)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(
    transition_flag,
    is.finite(prev_end_X),
    is.finite(prev_end_Y),
    is.finite(start_X),
    is.finite(start_Y)
  )

transition_line_geom <-
  st_sfc(
    lapply(
      seq_len(nrow(transition_df)),
      function(i) {
        st_linestring(
          matrix(
            c(
              transition_df$prev_end_X[i],
              transition_df$prev_end_Y[i],
              transition_df$start_X[i],
              transition_df$start_Y[i]
            ),
            ncol = 2,
            byrow = TRUE
          )
        )
      }
    ),
    crs = 32610
  )

transition_lines <-
  st_sf(
    transition_df,
    geometry = transition_line_geom
  ) |>
  st_transform(
    4326
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Corrected detection start/end point layers
# ------------------------------------------------------------

detection_starts <-
  detection_starts_32610 |>
  st_transform(
    4326
  )

detection_ends <-
  detection_ends_32610 |>
  st_transform(
    4326
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Popup and label text
# ------------------------------------------------------------

detection_lines$popup_text <-
  paste0(
    "<b>Detection Step</b>",

    "<br><b>Tag:</b> ",
    detection_lines$tag_id,

    "<br><b>Sex:</b> ",
    detection_lines$Sex,

    "<br><b>Tag Site:</b> ",
    detection_lines$TagSiteName,

    "<br><b>Tracking:</b> ",
    detection_lines$tracking_period,

    "<br><b>Behavior:</b> ",
    detection_lines$behavior_type_map,

    "<br><b>Episode Type:</b> ",
    detection_lines$episode_type_map,

    "<br><b>Date:</b> ",
    detection_lines$obs_date,

    "<br><b>Site:</b> ",
    detection_lines$SiteName_popup,

    "<br><b>Start Time:</b> ",
    detection_lines$t1_,

    "<br><b>End Time:</b> ",
    detection_lines$t2_
  )

transition_lines$popup_text <-
  paste0(
    "<b>Between Detection Episodes / Dates</b>",

    "<br><b>Tag:</b> ",
    transition_lines$tag_id,

    "<br><b>Sex:</b> ",
    transition_lines$Sex,

    "<br><b>Tag Site:</b> ",
    transition_lines$TagSiteName,

    "<br><b>From Episode:</b> ",
    transition_lines$prev_episode_id,

    "<br><b>From State:</b> ",
    transition_lines$prev_state,

    "<br><b>Previous End:</b> ",
    transition_lines$prev_t2,

    "<br><b>To Episode:</b> ",
    transition_lines$episode_id,

    "<br><b>To State:</b> ",
    transition_lines$state,

    "<br><b>Current Start:</b> ",
    transition_lines$t1_
  )

detection_starts$popup_text <-
  paste0(
    "<b>Detection Point</b>",

    "<br><b>Tag:</b> ",
    detection_starts$tag_id,

    "<br><b>Sex:</b> ",
    detection_starts$Sex,

    "<br><b>Tag Site:</b> ",
    detection_starts$TagSiteName,

    "<br><b>Tracking:</b> ",
    detection_starts$tracking_period,

    "<br><b>Behavior:</b> ",
    detection_starts$behavior_type_map,

    "<br><b>Episode Type:</b> ",
    detection_starts$episode_type_map,

    "<br><b>Date:</b> ",
    detection_starts$obs_date,

    "<br><b>Site:</b> ",
    detection_starts$SiteName_popup,

    "<br><b>Time:</b> ",
    detection_starts$t1_
  )

detection_ends$popup_text <-
  paste0(
    "<b>Detection Point</b>",

    "<br><b>Tag:</b> ",
    detection_ends$tag_id,

    "<br><b>Sex:</b> ",
    detection_ends$Sex,

    "<br><b>Tag Site:</b> ",
    detection_ends$TagSiteName,

    "<br><b>Tracking:</b> ",
    detection_ends$tracking_period,

    "<br><b>Behavior:</b> ",
    detection_ends$behavior_type_map,

    "<br><b>Episode Type:</b> ",
    detection_ends$episode_type_map,

    "<br><b>Date:</b> ",
    detection_ends$obs_date,

    "<br><b>Site:</b> ",
    detection_ends$SiteName_popup,

    "<br><b>Time:</b> ",
    detection_ends$t2_
  )

detection_starts$label_text <-
  paste0(
    detection_starts$tag_id,
    " | ",
    detection_starts$episode_type_map,
    " | ",
    detection_starts$behavior_type_map
  )

detection_ends$label_text <-
  paste0(
    detection_ends$tag_id,
    " | ",
    detection_ends$episode_type_map,
    " | ",
    detection_ends$behavior_type_map
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Map-ready detection lines
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Exclude detections without behavior type so they do not appear
# as an NA category in the line layer or legend.

detection_lines_map <-
  detection_lines[
    !is.na(detection_lines$behavior_type),
  ]
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

tag_ids <-
  readRDS("data/detections.rds") |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  pull(tag_id) |>
  unique() |>
  sort()

options_html <- paste(
  sapply(
    tag_ids,
    function(x) {
      selected <- if(x == selected_tag) "selected" else ""
      paste0(
        "<option value='detections_",
        x,
        ".html' ",
        selected,
        ">",
        x,
        "</option>"
      )
    }
  ),
  collapse = ""
)

cat(
  paste0(
    "<div style='margin-bottom:15px;'>",
    "<label><b>Select Tag:</b></label><br>",
    "<select onchange=\"window.location=this.value\">",
    options_html,
    "</select>",
    "</div>"
  )
)
```

### Tag: `r selected_tag` 

Interactive map of detections for the selected tag.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

m <- leaflet(
  width = "100%",
  height = "650px",
  options =
    leafletOptions(
      preferCanvas = TRUE
    )
) |>
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$Esri.WorldTopoMap
  ) |>
  addPolygons(
    data = boundary102,
    fillColor =
      ~site_status_pal(
        SiteStatus_map
      ),
    fillOpacity = 0.35,
    color =
      ~site_status_pal(
        SiteStatus_map
      ),
    weight = 2,
    opacity = 0.9,
    popup =
      ~paste0(
        "<b>Site:</b> ",
        SiteName,
        "<br><b>Status:</b> ",
        SiteStatus_map
      )
  ) |>
  addPolylines(
    data = detection_lines_map,
    color =
      ~behavior_pal(
        behavior_type
      ),
    weight = 2,
    opacity = 0.75,
    popup =
      ~popup_text
  ) |>
  addPolylines(
    data = transition_lines,
    color = "#333333",
    weight = 1.6,
    opacity = 0.32,
    dashArray = "4,6",
    popup =
      ~popup_text
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = detection_starts,
    radius = 3,
    stroke = TRUE,
    weight = 1,
    color = "black",
    fillColor =
      ~episode_type_pal(
        episode_type_map
      ),
    fillOpacity = 0.75,
    popup =
      ~popup_text,
    label =
      ~label_text
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = detection_ends,
    radius = 3,
    stroke = TRUE,
    weight = 1,
    color = "black",
    fillColor =
      ~episode_type_pal(
        episode_type_map
      ),
    fillOpacity = 0.75,
    popup =
      ~popup_text,
    label =
      ~label_text
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    pal = behavior_pal,
    values = detection_lines_map$behavior_type,
    title = "Behavior Type",
    opacity = 1
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    position = "topleft",
    pal = site_status_pal,
    values = c(
      "Active",
      "Other"
    ),
    title = "Site Status",
    opacity = 1
  ) |>
  addControl(
    html =
      htmltools::HTML(
        paste0(
          "<div style='",
          "background: white;",
          "padding: 8px 10px;",
          "border-radius: 4px;",
          "box-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);",
          "font-size: 14px;",
          "line-height: 18px;",
          "'>",

          "<div style='font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 4px;'>Episode Type</div>",

          "<div>",
          "<span style='",
          "display: inline-block;",
          "width: 10px;",
          "height: 10px;",
          "border-radius: 50%;",
          "background: #E41A1C;",
          "border: 1px solid black;",
          "margin-right: 6px;",
          "'></span>",
          "foray",
          "</div>",

          "<div>",
          "<span style='",
          "display: inline-block;",
          "width: 10px;",
          "height: 10px;",
          "border-radius: 50%;",
          "background: #984EA3;",
          "border: 1px solid black;",
          "margin-right: 6px;",
          "'></span>",
          "visit",
          "</div>",

          "<div>",
          "<span style='",
          "display: inline-block;",
          "width: 10px;",
          "height: 10px;",
          "border-radius: 50%;",
          "background: #7F7F7F;",
          "border: 1px solid black;",
          "margin-right: 6px;",
          "'></span>",
          "unclassified",
          "</div>",

          "</div>"
        )
      ),
    position = "bottomleft"
  )

m
```
